name: uig-studios
description: UIG Studios plugins for Claude Code — developer tooling for the x402 payment protocol and the Sui ecosystem.

plugins.name: x402-pilot
plugins.description: Developer-assistant for the x402 payment protocol: bundled spec corpus, a routing agent, authoring/review/conformance workflows, and a non-custodial conformance MCP. The build/learn/verify companion to the runtime @x402/mcp.
